name: How long do I have to file a chemical exposure claim after work incident in West Valley City?
description: Notify employer in 180 days, file within 3-6 years in Utah—don't delay.

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file a chemical exposure claim after work incident in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Notify employer in 180 days, file within 3-6 years in Utah—don't delay.
acceptedAnswer.description: **In Utah, you must notify your employer within 180 days of the injury or discovery, and file a formal claim within 3 years (6 years for occupational diseases).** Statutes of limitations vary by exposure type; for latent injuries like cancer from chemicals, the clock starts when symptoms appear.[1][2] Key factors: prompt reporting preserves benefits, medical evidence links exposure to harm, and delays risk denial. Document everything immediately, including dates and symptoms; submit Form 12 to the employer. A local attorney can ensure compliance with Utah-specific deadlines.
